calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Apr-10-2006 Vacated
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly for trial by court.

Appearances:
BRIAN F. CONNORS, Esq. on behalf of petitioner/contestant Michelle Wang Amezcua
JOHN K. HUSTER, Esq. on behalf of respondents Margaret M. Amezcua, Executor of the Estate of George M. Amezcua, Maria Corriea and Richard Corriea

The parties indicated that this matter has settled after being sent to Judge Pro Tem. Terms of the settlement were as follows: Michelle Wang Amezcua to full title to the property located at 240 - 45th Ave., #4, San Francisco, California. Michelle Wang Amezcua to have full title to business located at 1408 Taraval St., San Francisco, CA. Within 60 days, Michell Wang Amezcua to give respondents the sum of $2,300.00. Michaell Wang Amezcua to give up her entitlement on any accounts in George Amezcua's name and all joint accounts. CC 1542 waiver was put on the record. Michelle Wang Amezcua to liquidate stock account and to be given to respondent. Personal property as stated on the record to be returned within 30 days.
Judge Pro Tem: James Fleming; Clerks: Vera Mu/JIRoque; Reporter: Rita Howell #2542 (206)
